title: 30 screening in China at CCG Expo 2014
display_title: 30 screening in China at CCG Expo 2014
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 screening in China at CCG Expo 2014             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 10, 2014 7:19 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Also, international t-shirt desgins in China: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Chinese Eva fans, rejoice!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Jul 11, 2014 8:01 pm Stay Real is a Taiwanese brand but Eva T also carries it. The Eva T section of the Evastore could pick up the PRC shirt designs, but as of right now they're not up yet.
